quick_skim.title: Fully Unsupervised Detection of Physical Contacts on Subsea Cables via State-of-Polarization Monitoring
quick_skim.abstract: We present a fully unsupervised Fast-Slow DSVDD detector for continuous State-of-Polarization monitoring on a deployed subsea cable. Trained without event labels, it ranks all five confirmed trawler contacts within the top 13 of 122,174 recordings and surfaces additional corroborated cable-contact events.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: fully unsupervised detection of physical contacts on cables via polarization monitoring
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过偏振态监控完全无监督检测电缆接触
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过偏振态监控完全无监督检测电缆接触
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过偏振态监控完全无监督检测电缆接触
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a fully unsupervised Fast-Slow DSVDD detector for continuous State-of-Polarization monitoring on subsea cables, ranking all five confirmed trawler contacts within top 13 out of 122,174 recordings, demonstrating excellent detection performance without labeled data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对海底电缆接触事件的无监督检测难题，该文提出Fast-Slow DSVDD检测器，利用偏振态连续监控实现完全无监督异常检测。在真实部署电缆上，该方法将全部5个已确认拖网接触事件排在前13位，并发现额外可验证事件，展示了无需标签即可高效检测物理接触的能力，为管道泄漏检测提供了可迁移的方法论。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对海底电缆接触事件的无监督检测难题，该文提出Fast-Slow DSVDD检测器，利用偏振态连续监控实现完全无监督异常检测。在真实部署电缆上，该方法将全部5个已确认拖网接触事件排在前13位，并发现额外可验证事件，展示了无需标签即可高效检测物理接触的能力，为管道泄漏检测提供了可迁移的方法论。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: methods for detecting leaks in heating pipes

quick_skim.title: ArcAD: Anomaly-Rectified Calibration for Cold-Start Supervised Anomaly Detection
quick_skim.abstract: The deployment of Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) in real-world manufacturing frequently encounters a challenging cold-start bottleneck, in which limited normal samples fail to represent the full normal distribution and only a few anomalies are available. Under such a regime, existing methods struggle to form compact normal boundaries and fail to effectively exploit supervised signals from rare defects. To address this challenge, we propose Anomaly-Rectified Cold-start AD (ArcAD), a plug-and-play calibration framework for reconstruction-based IAD baselines. ArcAD follows a push-pull learning paradigm to construct a compact and discriminative normal boundary under data scarcity. On the one hand, ArcAD projects limited normal samples onto a hypersphere and pulls them into multiple compact clusters to maximize coverage of the normal manifold. On the other hand, it synthesizes pseudo-anomalies on the hypersphere and leverages real anomalies to push the boundary inward and sharpen anomaly discrimination. Extensive experiments on MVTec-AD, VisA, Real-IAD, and MANTA demonstrate that ArcAD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and unsupervised methods in both single-class and multi-class settings under cold-start conditions. Code is available at: https://github.com/LGC-AD/ArcAD.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: cold-start supervised anomaly detection for industrial settings, applicable to pipeline leak detection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 工业冷启动监督异常检测方法，可应用于管道泄漏检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 工业冷启动监督异常检测方法，可应用于管道泄漏检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 工业冷启动监督异常检测方法，可应用于管道泄漏检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ArcAD, a plug-and-play calibration framework for reconstruction-based anomaly detection, addressing cold-start with limited normal samples and few anomalies via push-pull learning to form compact normal boundaries.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对工业异常检测冷启动难题（正常样本有限、异常极少），提出无插件校准框架ArcAD，采用推-拉学习范式构建紧凑且可区分的正常边界。实验表明该方法在稀缺数据下显著提升重建型异常检测基线的性能，可推广至管道泄漏等工业场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对工业异常检测冷启动难题（正常样本有限、异常极少），提出无插件校准框架ArcAD，采用推-拉学习范式构建紧凑且可区分的正常边界。实验表明该方法在稀缺数据下显著提升重建型异常检测基线的性能，可推广至管道泄漏等工业场景。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: techniques and methods for leak detection in pipelines
